title: Squirrel Removal in Forest Hills, Queens | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Forest Hills, Queens. Licensed experts remove squirrels from attics, walls & chimneys. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Forest Hills, where the tree-lined streets and historic Tudor homes provide ideal nesting opportunities in attics and chimneys. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Forest Hills, from the Gardens to the close-knit residential neighborhoods near Queens Boulevard. Our humane removal methods protect your property while safely relocating these persistent pests.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Forest Hills residents, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges posed by the area's mature trees and vintage housing stock. Our licensed technicians provide thorough inspections, humane removal, complete exclusion work, and full attic restoration with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Forest Hills' beautiful canopy of oak and maple trees, while adding to the neighborhood's charm, creates highways for squirrels to access rooftops and attics. The area's many pre-war co-ops, Tudor-style homes, and properties near Forest Park are particularly vulnerable to squirrel intrusions, especially during fall nesting season.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Forest Hills?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Forest Hills typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and minor repairs. Properties with extensive attic damage or multiple squirrels may require additional restoration services.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Forest Hills?
faqs.answer: Forest Hills' abundance of mature trees, proximity to Forest Park, and historic architecture create perfect conditions for squirrels. The neighborhood's older homes often have small gaps in soffits, fascia boards, and roof vents that squirrels exploit for nesting. Fall and spring are peak seasons when squirrels seek warm attic spaces for shelter and raising young.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Forest Hills home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Forest Hills. Most squirrel removals are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and their location. We use one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not return, ensuring complete removal without separating mothers from babies during nesting season.

faqs.question: Do squirrels cause damage to homes in Forest Hills?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage to Forest Hills homes. They chew through wood, insulation, and electrical wiring, creating fire hazards. Their droppings and urine contaminate attic insulation, and their constant gnawing can damage roof structures, particularly in older Tudor and colonial-style homes common in the area. Prompt removal prevents costly repairs.
